examples: Don't just say nothing. Tell me what's going on.
Nothing bad will happen, will it?

definitions.text: An absence of anything, including empty space, brightness, darkness, matter, or a vacuum.
Something trifling, or of no consequence or importance.
examples: - What happened to your face?- It's nothing.

definitions.text: A trivial remark especially in the term sweet nothings.
Not at all; in no way.
examples: Nothing too much out of the ordinary.
Nothing dismayed, I repeated my query.
Dallas scored on what had seemed until then like a nothing play.
The cricketer played a nothing shot.

definitions.text: Never mind; it's not important; forget what I said.
